description.value: Price 7,000 gp; Slot ring; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint conjuration [good, law] DESCRIPTION This ring is made of hammered steel. If the wearer can cast summon monster spells, the wearer adds harbingers to the 3rd-level list of monsters he can summon with those spells, adds legion archon to the 6th-level list, and adds shield archon to the 7th-level list. Also, once per day on command the wearer can use this ring to summon a harbinger, as if by the summon monster III spell. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,500 gp; Feats Forge Ring; Spells planar ally or planar binding; Special creator must be neutral good
